plugins.name: draft-pmkt
plugins.description: When assessing seed stage and early-stage technology startups a PMKT document is created from the  information gathered in the investment memo. The PMKT is a comprehensive analysis of the startup’s Product and Technology, Market, Capital, and Team, structured to provide a clear recommendation on the investment opportunity.

plugins.name: company-evaluator
plugins.description: Produces an early-stage VC investment memo with founder diligence, investor signal analysis, market research, and competitive positioning. Use when a user asks to evaluate a startup, prepare an investment memo, assess founder-market fit, compare startup competitors, or diligence a company from a URL/pitch deck. Do not use for public-market stock analysis, personal financial advice, or legal counsel.
